languages.text: "Если вам будет угодно, так мы хоть себе в брюхо их направим, Ваше Сиятельство".

traits.locale_text: "Если вам будет угодно, так мы хоть себе в брюхо их направим, Ваше Сиятельство".

languages.text: "If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."
languages.original_text: "Если вам будет угодно, так мы хоть себе в брюхо их направим, Ваше Сиятельство".

traits.locale_text: "If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll direct them right into our own guts."
"If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll direct them right into our own guts."
"If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."
"If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."

languages.text: “只要您下令，大人，我们会立刻拿这些刀往自己肚子上捅。”
languages.original_text: "If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."

traits.locale_text: “只要您下令，大人，我们会立刻拿这些刀往自己肚子上捅。”

languages.text: "Siz emredin {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, onları doğrudan kendi bağırsaklarımıza bile çeviririz."
languages.original_text: "If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."

traits.locale_text: "Siz emredin {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, onları doğrudan kendi bağırsaklarımıza bile çeviririz."

languages.text: « Si vous nous en donniez l'ordre, Votre Seigneurie, on s'en servirait pour mettre nos propres tripes à l'air. »
languages.original_text: "If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."

traits.locale_text: « Si vous nous en donniez l'ordre, Votre Seigneurie, on s'en servirait pour mettre nos propres tripes à l'air. »

languages.text: «Si lo ordena, mi{mf|lord|lady}, las usaremos hasta para eviscerarnos».
languages.original_text: "If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."

traits.locale_text: «Si lo ordena, mi{mf|lord|lady}, las usaremos hasta para eviscerarnos».

languages.text: "Wenn Ihr es befehlt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, richten wir sie direkt auf unsere eigenen Gedärme."
languages.original_text: "If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn Ihr es befehlt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, richten wir sie direkt auf unsere eigenen Gedärme."

languages.text: 「ご命を仰ぎますと、お方、おのれの腹に直撃させます」
languages.original_text: "If you so command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll aim them right at our own guts."

traits.locale_text: 「ご命を仰ぎますと、お方、おのれの腹に直撃させます」
